title: Catching
body:
# **Catching**

Catching is like catching on LetsHugoTv's former Minecraft server but is coded itself..

Since the plugin is for a **Minecraft Network**, if you use it on a Minecraft server, the world **"world_game"** can currently be **delete** manually. And the world generation when there are larger areas of ice could recharge.

### The only Permission that is in the plugin is **fangen.admin**!

Here is an example video:
